arts.ttl: Cole Palmer sets insane record and matches another with latest Chelsea goal glut
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has set a new Premier League record in unbelievable fashion on Saturday. The Chelsea star was in unstoppable form at Stamford Bridge as he put four past Brighton in an insane 20-minute period of the game. That makes him the first player in the history of the Premier League to score four goals […] The post Cole Palmer sets insane record and matches another with latest Chelsea goal glut first appeared on The Football Faithful.
